label: OmegaX Health Genesis Protect claim-simulation aggregate summary
sourceBoundary: Generated by the private OmegaX Health protocol-oracle claim simulator; raw cases, synthetic user profiles, and scenario-pack internals are not included in this public repo.
publicNarrative: Health owns the proprietary claim realism engine. Protocol publishes only aggregate proof that the engine runs at meaningful scale and informs launch-gate review.
currentPublicUse: avoid publishing raw synthetic users or case packets

runs.publicUse: Aggregate evidence for claim-case breadth and operational stress testing.
publicFindings: current public evidence set uses 198000 deterministic synthetic cases
raw case corpus remains private in Health
public protocol uses this only as aggregate simulation proof

runs.publicUse: Aggregate evidence that the simulator can scale to multi-million-case deterministic runs.
publicFindings: historical max run reached 3000000 deterministic synthetic claims
the run used three equal stress lanes
raw export is not present in protocol and should not be reconstructed here

excludedFields: private backend or operator workflow traces
disclaimer: Synthetic planning artifact only. Not real claim history, not external actuarial certification, not underwriting advice, not legal or regulatory advice.
